title: Seagate Wins Manufacturing Leadership Award from a Jury of Its Peers
text: FREMONT, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Seagate Technology likes to keep its factories smart. Today, the company received an award for an achievement in smart manufacturing from a group of its manufacturing peers—a national association of manufacturers with 14,000 company members. Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ: STX), a world leader in data storage solutions, won a 2022 Manufacturing Leadership Award for its outstanding innovation from the Manufacturing Leadership Council (MLC) at the Nation

title: Why Has Seagate Technology Stock Doubled Since 2018 Despite Just 7% Sales Growth?
text: Seagate Technology stock price gained 137% from around $38 at 2018 end, to over $90 currently, primarily due to favorable changes in its P/S multiple. However, the company witnessed just a 7% rise in revenue over this period, but revenue per share has increased, helped by a 23% drop in the.

title: Seagate (STX) & ROVE to Work Together on Mass Storage Solutions
text: Seagate (STX) teams up with ROVE to simplify complications surrounding mass data storage solutions.

title: ROVE and Seagate Enable Mass-Capacity Data Storage and Transfer Solutions
text: CHARLOTTE, NC.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #seagate--ROVE, a Veteran-owned systems integrator, today announced a collaboration with Seagate® Technology Holdings plc.

title: Seagate: We're Back To A 'Buy'
text: Seagate is, to me, a fairly easy stock to "trade" and to move back and forth on. I made triple-digit returns before moving to a "HOLD" in my last piece.
